untranslatable_reason: EEDT pattern requires detection of two equal highs (double top) and measurement of pattern height vs width relative to sample count and median distance between tops. These structural/morphological characteristics cannot be expressed with available point-in-time indicators. The pattern identification requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic beyond single-bar indicator conditions. Tall (fewer than 30 samples) vs narrow classification requires pattern geometry analysis not available in the indicator set.
